title: The Disappearance of My Mother
original_title: Storia di B – La scomparsa di mia madre
overview: Aging fashion model Benedetta Barzini strives to escape the world of images and disappear for good, but her son’s determination to make a final film about her sparks an unexpected collaboration and confrontation with the camera’s gaze.
